name: Madesh Arulananthan
intro: A Computer Engineering student passionate about building technology that solves real-world problems. I enjoy developing web applications, embedded systems, and robotics that are intuitive, reliable, and impactful. Through continuous learning and practical problem-solving, I strive to create technology that is efficient, scalable, and meaningful.
introHtml: Building technology that solves real-world problems through thoughtful engineering, continuous learning, and a focus on creating efficient, high-impact solutions.
